title: Voltera Drive Assist 3.0 — Rollout Timeline
subtitle: Fully synthetic sample data for a fictional EV software rollout. No real people, companies, or files.

tabs.label: 1. Product & Design
tabs.heading: Product & design
tabs.description: Discovery, the product definition, and the design of Drive Assist 3.0.
tabs.summary: Drive Assist 3.0 starts as a discovery effort: UX research probes why drivers disengage today, product turns that into a definition and success metrics, and design works from early flows to a frozen spec. The signed PRD and the design freeze are the two gates everything downstream builds against.

events.title: Discovery kickoff
events.summary: Research scopes why drivers disengage from the current assist and where trust breaks down.

events.title: Diary study launched
events.summary: 30 owners log every disengagement for three weeks.

events.title: Disengagement themes
events.summary: Five recurring triggers identified; lane-change hesitation tops the list.
events.quote: Drivers grab the wheel most often during unprotected lane changes.

events.title: Trust & handover model
events.summary: A model for how the car should ask for and return control.

events.title: Concept testing round 1
events.summary: Three interaction concepts tested; the ambient-cue concept wins.
events.quote: Ambient cues felt 'calmer' than alerts; testers trusted them more.

events.title: Accessibility research
events.summary: Findings on cues for low-vision and hard-of-hearing drivers.

events.title: Beta interview program set up
events.summary: Recurring interview cadence stood up for the beta phase.

events.title: Pre-launch perception study
events.summary: Owners rate the near-final experience; trust scores up sharply.
events.quote: Net trust score moved from +12 to +41 versus today's assist.
events.significance: Validates the handover model right before staged rollout.

events.title: Design exploration begins
events.summary: First flows for engagement, lane changes, and handover.

events.title: Cluster & HUD concepts
events.summary: Competing instrument-cluster treatments sketched.

events.title: Interaction spec v1
events.summary: First end-to-end interaction spec for review.

events.title: Handover animation prototype
events.summary: Motion prototype for the control handover sequence.
events.quote: The 1.5s ramp reads as 'the car is handing back', not 'the car gave up.'

events.title: Sound design pass
events.summary: Earcons designed for engage, warn, and handover.

events.title: Design review with safety
events.summary: Safety flags two cues that could be missed in sunlight.
events.quote: High-glare conditions wash out the amber cue; needs a redundant channel.

events.title: Redundant cue added
events.summary: Haptic seat cue added as a backup to the visual handover.

events.title: Design freeze
events.summary: Interaction and visual spec frozen for build.
events.significance: The spec engineering builds to; later changes need a variance.

events.title: Localization handoff
events.summary: Strings and cues handed to localization for 14 markets.

events.title: Problem brief circulated
events.summary: One-pager framing the opportunity and bets.

events.title: Success metrics defined
events.summary: Primary metric set to miles-per-disengagement; guardrails on comfort.
events.quote: North star: 5x miles-per-disengagement without raising hard-brake events.

events.title: PRD signed off
events.summary: Product requirements approved by engineering and safety leadership.
events.significance: Authorizes the full build; scope is now contract.

events.title: Scope cut: no auto lane-change at launch
events.summary: Auto lane-change deferred to a fast-follow to protect the date.
events.quote: We ship driver-confirmed lane changes first; full auto is a 3.1 item.
events.significance: De-risks the launch date by removing the hardest behavior.

events.title: Roadmap & milestones locked
events.summary: Build, validation, beta, and launch milestones agreed.

events.title: Pricing & packaging decision
events.summary: Feature ships included on new trims, subscription for existing fleet.

events.title: Go/no-go criteria published
events.summary: The exact metrics that gate each rollout stage.

events.title: Launch readiness review #1
events.summary: First cross-functional readiness check; two ambers on support load.

events.title: Launch readiness review #2
events.summary: All gates green; recommends opening the staged OTA.
events.significance: Formal authorization to begin the production rollout.

tabs.label: 2. Engineering
tabs.heading: Engineering
tabs.description: Perception ML, vehicle software, cloud platform, and the mobile app.
tabs.summary: Four engineering tracks build in parallel for the better part of a year. Perception ML retrains the night/rain stack and recovers from a tunnel false-positive regression; vehicle software integrates the planner and the new handover; cloud builds the OTA pipeline and shadow-mode telemetry; and the mobile app adds trip review and the consent flow. Perception sign-off and the release-candidate build are the milestones the rest gate on.

events.title: Perception 3.0 research kickoff
events.summary: Scope the next-gen stack targeting night and rain performance.

events.title: Dataset expansion plan
events.summary: Plan to triple the labeled night-driving set; new labeling vendor engaged.

events.title: Baseline model benchmarked
events.summary: New backbone beats production on the internal benchmark.
events.quote: +7% mAP on the night/rain slice; latency within budget.

events.title: Architecture review
events.summary: Cross-team review approves multi-camera fusion.

events.title: Regression: tunnel false positives
events.summary: Shadow-mode flags phantom braking entering tunnels.
events.quote: Tunnel entrances trigger false positives; the exposure shift is the cause.
events.significance: Triggers a data campaign and a two-week slip.

events.title: Tunnel dataset + retrain
events.summary: Targeted data collected; false positives down 90%.

events.title: Model frozen for validation (rc1)
events.summary: Candidate v3.0-rc1 handed to validation.
events.significance: The model build the whole validation campaign runs against.

events.title: Quantization accuracy check
events.summary: Quantized model verified within tolerance of float.
events.quote: INT8 within 0.4% of float on the validation slice.

events.title: Edge-case hardening (rc2)
events.summary: Long-tail cases — debris, animals — addressed.

events.title: Shadow A/B vs production
events.summary: rc2 shadow-driven against the shipping model for two weeks.
events.significance: Real-road evidence the new model is safe to let drive.

events.title: Per-batch camera calibration
events.summary: Calibration across camera batches removes a model bias.

events.title: Perception sign-off (rc3)
events.summary: Validation accepts rc3 for the beta program.
events.significance: Unblocks beta for the perception stack.

events.title: Planner integration branch opened
events.summary: New behavior planner wired into the vehicle stack behind a flag.

events.title: Handover state machine
events.summary: Implements the design's engage/warn/handover transitions.

events.title: Compute budget exceeded
events.summary: New stack overruns the SoC compute budget at peak.
events.quote: Peak load is 118% of budget; we need to prune or offload.
events.significance: Risks a hardware floor that would exclude older cars.

events.title: Optimization recovers headroom
events.summary: Operator fusion and quantization bring peak under budget.
events.quote: Back to 86% peak; older HW3 cars stay in scope.

events.title: Driver-confirmed lane change
events.summary: Ships the launch-scope lane-change behavior.

events.title: Fail-safe & fallback paths
events.summary: Graceful degradation when a sensor drops out.

events.title: Feature-flagged for beta
events.summary: Behavior gated behind the staged-rollout flag service.

events.title: Release candidate cut
events.summary: rc build assembled with frozen perception and planner.
events.significance: The exact build beta and validation run against.

events.title: OTA pipeline design
events.summary: Design for staged, reversible over-the-air delivery.

events.title: Shadow-mode telemetry
events.summary: Pipeline to log model decisions without acting on them.
events.quote: Shadow mode lets us measure a build on real roads before it drives.

events.title: Staged-rollout flag service
events.summary: Percentage-based targeting with instant rollback.

events.title: Load test: 1M vehicles
events.summary: Simulated fleet check-in storm; one bottleneck found and fixed.
events.quote: Check-in p99 held under 400ms at 1M simulated cars.

events.title: Rollback drill
events.summary: Game-day proves a bad build can be pulled fleet-wide fast.
events.quote: Full-fleet rollback completed in 22 minutes end to end.
events.significance: The safety net that makes a staged production rollout acceptable.

events.title: Region failover
events.summary: Multi-region failover for the update service.

events.title: Capacity reserved for launch
events.summary: Headroom provisioned for the rollout window.

events.title: Canary metrics auto-halt
events.summary: Auto-pause if canary safety metrics regress.
events.significance: Lets the OTA stop itself without a human in the loop.

events.title: Consent & enrollment flow
events.summary: In-app flow to opt into the beta and accept terms.

events.title: Trip review screen
events.summary: Post-drive view of where assist helped or handed back.

events.title: Feedback capture
events.summary: One-tap 'that felt wrong' tied to a trip timestamp.
events.quote: Owners can flag a moment; it lands on the engineer's dashboard.

events.title: Push: update available
events.summary: Notifies eligible cars an update is ready.

events.title: App store review friction
events.summary: Reviewer questions the driving-feature screenshots.
events.quote: Store reviewer asked us to clarify it's driver-supervised.

events.title: Beta build approved
events.summary: App update with beta features clears review.

events.title: Localized release
events.summary: App shipped in 14 markets ahead of rollout.

events.title: Launch app live
events.summary: Public app update with Drive Assist 3.0 surfaces.
events.significance: Front door for owners on launch day.

tabs.label: 3. Validation & Safety
tabs.heading: Validation & safety
tabs.description: Simulation, closed-track testing, the safety case, and regulatory filings.
tabs.summary: Validation is the long pole. Simulation runs millions of scenario miles and surfaces an unprotected-left weakness; track testing reproduces and clears it; the safety case assembles the argument and evidence; and regulatory files in the launch markets. The safety case approval and the first market clearance are the gates that release the production rollout.

events.title: Scenario library v3
events.summary: Expanded library covering the new behaviors.

events.title: First full-stack sim run
events.summary: rc1 driven through 2M scenario miles overnight.
events.quote: 2.1M sim miles; one cluster of failures at unprotected lefts.

events.title: Unprotected-left weakness
events.summary: Sim isolates a gap-acceptance bug on unprotected left turns.
events.quote: The planner accepts gaps a cautious human would reject.
events.significance: Becomes the headline issue track testing must clear.

events.title: Regression suite green
events.summary: Fix verified across the expanded suite.

events.title: Rare-event resampling
events.summary: Suite reweighted toward the long tail.

events.title: Fault-injection campaign
events.summary: Sensor dropouts and degraded compute injected at scale.

events.title: Coverage report
events.summary: Scenario coverage mapped to the safety case claims.

events.title: Replay of beta disengagements
events.summary: Real beta disengagements replayed in sim to confirm fixes.
events.quote: Every reported beta disengagement now passes in sim.

events.title: Sim-to-track correlation
events.summary: Sim outcomes correlated against the track results.

events.title: Final sim sign-off
events.summary: rc3 passes the full campaign with no open criticals.
events.significance: Simulation's release recommendation.

events.title: Test plan approved
events.summary: Closed-track plan for the new behaviors and edge cases.

events.title: First track week
events.summary: Baseline runs on the proving ground.

events.title: Unprotected-left reproduced
events.summary: Track reproduces the sim's gap-acceptance issue with a soft target.
events.quote: Confirmed on track with the foam vehicle; matches sim exactly.

events.title: Wet & low-sun sessions
events.summary: Adverse-condition runs for handover cues.

events.title: Unprotected-left cleared
events.summary: Fix passes the track battery with margin.
events.quote: 200/200 clean runs after the planner fix.
events.significance: Clears the headline safety issue for beta.

events.title: Night cut-in testing
events.summary: Aggressive cut-ins at night with the new perception.

events.title: Track sign-off
events.summary: Closed-course program complete; no open criticals.
events.significance: Track testing's go for on-road beta expansion.

events.title: Safety case outline
events.summary: Top-level claims-and-evidence structure agreed.

events.title: Hazard analysis updated
events.summary: HARA refreshed for the new behaviors.

events.title: Threat & misuse review
events.summary: Foreseeable-misuse analysis for the handover.

events.title: Operational design domain locked
events.summary: The exact conditions the feature may engage in.
events.significance: Bounds where the feature operates — central to the case.

events.title: Independent safety audit
events.summary: Third-party reviewer probes the argument; two findings.
events.quote: Auditor: strengthen the evidence for the degraded-sensor claim.
events.significance: External findings must close before approval.

events.title: Human-factors study readout
events.summary: Attention and reaction data feed the driver-monitoring thresholds.

events.title: Findings closed
events.summary: Both audit findings addressed with added evidence.

events.title: Recall-risk assessment
events.summary: Worst-case mitigation paths reviewed with legal.

events.title: Driver-monitoring threshold set
events.summary: Attention thresholds tuned with human-factors data.

events.title: Safety case approved
events.summary: Safety leadership approves the case for staged rollout.
events.significance: The central gate: production rollout cannot start without it.

events.title: Market applicability matrix
events.summary: Which behaviors are allowed in which launch markets.

events.title: Pre-submission meeting
events.summary: Early alignment with the lead-market regulator.
events.quote: Regulator open to driver-confirmed lane change; wants DMS data.

events.title: Type-approval dossier drafted
events.summary: Technical dossier assembled for the lead market.

events.title: Dossier filed (lead market)
events.summary: Formal submission lodged.

events.title: Regulator clarification round
events.summary: Authority requests added human-factors evidence.
events.quote: They want the attention-monitoring false-negative rate.

events.title: Lead-market clearance
events.summary: First market approves Drive Assist 3.0 for public release.
events.significance: Opens the first geography for staged OTA.

events.title: Second-wave market filings
events.summary: Filings lodged for the next four markets.

tabs.label: 4. Beta Program
tabs.heading: Beta program
tabs.description: Internal fleet dogfood, an invite-only early access, and the expanded public beta.
tabs.summary: Confidence is built in widening circles. The internal fleet dogfoods first and catches a cold-start bug; an invite-only early-access group of owners drives real roads under heavy telemetry; and the expanded beta scales to thousands, surfacing a freeway-merge complaint that drives a tuning fix. The expanded-beta safety review feeds directly into the launch decision.

events.title: Employee fleet enrolled
events.summary: 300 employee vehicles opted into dogfood.

events.title: First dogfood build
events.summary: rc1 pushed to the internal fleet.

events.title: Cold-start handover bug
events.summary: Handover cue misfires in the first minute after wake.
events.quote: On cold start the seat haptic fires a beat early.
events.significance: Caught internally before any customer saw it.

events.title: Cold-start fix verified
events.summary: Fix confirmed across the fleet.

events.title: Dogfood survey
events.summary: Employees rate trust and comfort weekly.

events.title: Internal go for early access
events.summary: Fleet metrics clear the bar to invite customers.
events.significance: Opens the door to the first external drivers.

events.title: Early-access cohort selected
events.summary: 500 owners chosen across climates and road types.

events.title: Consent & onboarding
events.summary: Cohort completes the in-app consent and tutorial.

events.title: First customer miles
events.summary: Drive Assist 3.0 on public roads with real owners.
events.significance: First non-employee exposure on real roads.

events.title: Telematics consent refresh
events.summary: Cohort re-consents to expanded data capture.

events.title: Weekly telemetry review
events.summary: Disengagements triaged with engineering each week.

events.title: Cold-climate sub-cohort
events.summary: Snow-market owners added to stress winter conditions.

events.title: Construction-zone reports
events.summary: Owners report hesitancy in long construction zones.
events.quote: Cones with no lane lines make it over-cautious.

events.title: Construction tuning shipped
events.summary: Targeted update improves cone-zone behavior.

events.title: Roundabout edge cases
events.summary: Owners report odd lane choice at multi-lane roundabouts.
events.quote: Multi-lane roundabouts confuse lane choice on exit.

events.title: Trust scores trending up
events.summary: Cohort trust metric climbs week over week.
events.quote: Week-6 trust up 18 points versus week 1.

events.title: Early-access exit review
events.summary: Cohort metrics support expanding the beta.
events.significance: Greenlights the jump to thousands of cars.

events.title: Expanded beta opens
events.summary: Beta scales from 500 to 8,000 vehicles.
events.significance: Largest pre-launch exposure of the feature.

events.title: Onboarding load spike
events.summary: Surge of enrollments stresses the consent service.
events.quote: Consent service hit 6x normal; autoscaled cleanly.

events.title: Freeway-merge complaints
events.summary: A cluster of reports about timid freeway merges.
events.quote: It waits for huge gaps on busy merges; feels unnatural.
events.significance: The top issue to resolve before public launch.

events.title: Merge-aggressiveness tuning
events.summary: Calibrated a more natural merge gap-acceptance.

events.title: Referral waitlist opens
events.summary: Beta owners can refer others; the waitlist swells.

events.title: Merge fix validated in beta
events.summary: Complaint rate drops sharply after the update.
events.quote: Merge complaints down 80% week over week.

events.title: Night-merge follow-up
events.summary: Targeted check that the merge fix held at night.

events.title: A/B on cue timing
events.summary: Two handover-timing variants tested in the field.

events.title: Beta safety metrics report
events.summary: Miles-per-disengagement up 4.6x with stable hard-braking.
events.quote: 4.6x MPD, hard-brake events flat — within launch criteria.

events.title: Comfort survey wave
events.summary: Large survey on ride comfort and trust.

events.title: Expanded-beta sign-off
events.summary: Beta meets every go criterion for staged rollout.
events.significance: Feeds straight into the launch go/no-go.

tabs.label: 5. Rollout & Launch
tabs.heading: Rollout & launch
tabs.description: The staged production OTA, marketing, support readiness, and external comms.
tabs.summary: The production rollout goes out in widening rings — 1% → 10% → 50% → 100% — each gated on live safety telemetry, with a brief pause at 10% to chase a metric blip. Marketing builds the story and reveals on launch day, support staffs and trains for the wave, and comms manages press and a measured response to early scrutiny. Reaching 100% availability is the finish line of the program.

events.title: Rollout runbook finalized
events.summary: Step-by-step plan with halt criteria per ring.

events.title: 1% canary live
events.summary: First production ring receives Drive Assist 3.0.
events.quote: Canary safety metrics matched beta within noise.
events.significance: The feature is now in customers' hands in production.

events.title: 10% ring
events.summary: Rollout widens to 10% of eligible vehicles.

events.title: Auto-halt at 10%
events.summary: A disengagement-rate blip trips the auto-halt.
events.quote: A regional weather event spiked disengagements; auto-halt worked.
events.significance: First real test of the self-stopping rollout.

events.title: Resumed after analysis
events.summary: Blip traced to fog, not the build; rollout resumes.

events.title: 50% ring
events.summary: Half the eligible fleet now updated.

events.title: Hold for holiday traffic
events.summary: Brief planned hold over peak travel days.

events.title: 100% availability
events.summary: Drive Assist 3.0 available to the full eligible fleet.
events.significance: Rollout complete — the program's finish line.

events.title: Positioning & narrative
events.summary: Story centers on 'calmer, more trustworthy assist'.

events.title: Demo film shoot
events.summary: Hero film capturing the handover experience.

events.title: Site & release assets
events.summary: Launch page and creative locked.

events.title: Owner email sequence
events.summary: Staged email plan matched to the OTA rings.

events.title: Launch-day reveal
events.summary: Feature announced as the canary goes live.
events.quote: Reveal drove record traffic to the configurator.
events.significance: Public unveiling of Drive Assist 3.0.

events.title: Owner explainer push
events.summary: How-it-works content to the updated fleet.

events.title: Availability moment
events.summary: Full-availability announcement to all owners.

events.title: Support readiness plan
events.summary: Staffing and tooling plan for the rollout wave.

events.title: Agent training
events.summary: Agents trained on the feature and handover model.

events.title: Knowledge base published
events.summary: Owner-facing articles and an internal runbook live.

events.title: Day-1 contact spike
events.summary: Questions surge as the canary lands; within forecast.
events.quote: Contacts +35% day one, staffed for +50%; no backlog.

events.title: Top issue: handover confusion
events.summary: Most contacts are about why the car handed back.
events.quote: People want to know why it handed control back in fog.
events.significance: Drives an in-app explainer and a KB update.

events.title: In-app explainer shipped
events.summary: Contextual explanation reduces repeat contacts.

events.title: Support load normalizes
events.summary: Contact rate settles to baseline post-100%.

events.title: Press strategy locked
events.summary: Embargoed briefings and Q&A prepared.

events.title: Analyst pre-briefs
events.summary: Background sessions with industry analysts.

events.title: Embargo lifts
events.summary: Coverage goes live alongside the canary.
events.quote: Largely positive; several outlets praised the calmer handover.

events.title: Scrutiny on auto-halt
events.summary: A report questions the 10% pause.
events.quote: Outlet framed the auto-halt as a 'stumble'.
events.significance: Tests the comms response to rollout transparency.

events.title: Transparency post
events.summary: Engineering blog explains the auto-halt as designed.
events.quote: We framed the halt as the safety net working, not failing.

events.title: Narrative recovers
events.summary: Follow-up coverage adopts the 'safety net' framing.

events.title: Availability press note
events.summary: Short note marks full availability.

tabs.label: 6. Post-Launch
tabs.heading: Post-launch
tabs.description: Fleet telemetry, incident response, and the first iteration cycle.
tabs.summary: After 100%, the work shifts to watching and improving. Telemetry confirms the headline metric holds at fleet scale; an incident track handles a localized phantom-braking cluster and a CDN-related update stall with published post-mortems; and iteration kicks off 3.1, including the auto lane-change that was cut from launch. The 3.1 kickoff closes the loop back to product.

events.title: Live safety dashboard
events.summary: Real-time MPD and hard-brake metrics per ring.

events.title: Fleet metric holds
events.summary: Miles-per-disengagement at 100% matches beta.
events.quote: Fleet MPD 4.5x — beta held at scale.
events.significance: Confirms the core bet survived going wide.

events.title: Weather-correlation study
events.summary: Disengagements correlate with heavy precipitation, as expected.

events.title: New-year traffic baseline
events.summary: Metrics re-baselined after holiday traffic patterns.

events.title: Long-tail intersection report
events.summary: Rare multi-way-stop hesitations flagged for iteration.

events.title: Per-market metric split
events.summary: Safety metrics broken out by market for regulators.

events.title: Monthly safety report
events.summary: First full month at full availability summarized.

events.title: Comfort-metric regression watch
events.summary: New tuning watched for comfort side effects.

events.title: Disengagement taxonomy v2
events.summary: Refined labels for why drivers take over.

events.title: Quarter retro metrics
events.summary: Quarter-over-quarter trends compiled for leadership.

events.title: Phantom-braking cluster
events.summary: A localized spike near one overpass design.
events.quote: Repeated hard-brakes at one overpass; geofenced within hours.
events.significance: First post-launch incident; contained without a recall.

events.title: Overpass mitigation
events.summary: Geofence plus a perception patch in shadow mode.

events.title: Phantom-braking post-mortem
events.summary: Blameless review; data campaign queued for 3.1.

events.title: Update-stall incident
events.summary: A CDN edge fault stalls updates in one region.
events.quote: 3% of a region stuck mid-update; rolled forward cleanly.
events.significance: No driving impact, but a delivery-reliability gap.

events.title: Stall mitigation
events.summary: Failover to a second CDN; stuck cars recovered.

events.title: Update-stall post-mortem
events.summary: Adds multi-CDN as a launch-blocker for future OTAs.

events.title: Incident trend review
events.summary: Two incidents in two months, both contained; trend flat.

events.title: 3.1 backlog groomed
events.summary: Beta and incident learnings sorted into the next cycle.

events.title: Auto lane-change resumes
events.summary: The launch-cut behavior re-enters active development.
events.quote: Full auto lane-change is the headline of 3.1.
events.significance: Brings back the feature deferred to protect the launch date.

events.title: Overpass data campaign
events.summary: Targeted collection from the post-mortem ships to labeling.

events.title: Comfort tuning experiment
events.summary: Field experiment on smoother deceleration profiles.

events.title: Intersection-handling spike
events.summary: Engineering spike on the long-tail intersection cases.

events.title: Auto lane-change sim gauntlet
events.summary: The 3.1 behavior enters the simulation suite.

events.title: 3.1 scope review
events.summary: Cross-functional review sets the 3.1 commitment.

events.title: 3.1 design spike
events.summary: Design explores the auto lane-change cues.

events.title: 3.1 kickoff
events.summary: Next release formally kicks off; cycle begins again.
events.significance: Closes the loop from launch learnings back into product.

events.title: 3.1 safety pre-read
events.summary: Early safety framing for the 3.1 behaviors.
